title: Citation
doc_html:
PART VI.  LOUISIANA ABANDONED OILFIELD

WASTE SITE LAW

§71.  Citation

This Part may be cited as the "Louisiana Abandoned Oilfield Waste Site Law".

Acts 1986, No. 892, §1, eff. July 10, 1986.
